content.en:
This Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon was sealed by the Ten Elements Ancestor, and the power in his body couldn't be exerted much at all, so Ye Tian could easily subdue this Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon.

I saw Ye Tian snatch this Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon out of the sealing ball, its huge body filled this void, and the terrifying coercion still made Ye Tian tremble.

If it weren't for the other party's sealed power, even if it was a juvenile Wanxiang Lin Dragon, Ye Tian would not be able to subdue it.

"It's worthy of being a special life that is comparable to the Seven Realms-level controllers from birth, and after so many years of cultivation, it's only comparable to the one that was just born!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

However, although this special life is very powerful, it also has a big flaw, that is, it has low intelligence, and it has such strength purely by relying on blood, physical body, and its own ability, and it has almost no way to break the boundaries and become a great existence like the Ten Elements Ancestor.

Therefore, no strong person will accept Wanxiang Linlong as a disciple, and they can only be reduced to mounts or research materials, which is also their ultimate fate.

Ye Tian dragged the Wanxiang Lin Dragon, and immediately ran the Life Devouring Technique, and began to devour the Wanxiang Lin Dragon.

The Soul Devouring Technique is really a bit similar to the Death Snatching Technique, both of which can devour life, but what he obtains is the opponent's ability and the enhancement of the flesh and the growth of life.

And the life-snatching technique is to consume one's own life at the cost of robbing the other party of the perception on the road.

There seemed to be no limit to the Death Snatching Technique, but the side effects were too great, and Ye Tian's Death Devouring Technique could only be cast three times, but it didn't have any side effects, only benefits.

If there were side effects, the Ten Elements Ancestor would not let him practice.

Of course, it is also because the Life Swallowing Technique is only allowed to be practiced by one person, and it cannot be spread, so it will not cause bad effects.

Rumble!!!!

Under the Fat-Swallowing Technique, the Wanxiang Linlong resisted frantically, but to no avail, it was gradually swallowed into Ye Tian's body by the Life-Swallowing Technique, and then slowly refined by Ye Tian.

Due to the strength of the life and abilities of the Myriad Phase Dragon, it took too long to devour the Myriad Dragon.

After devouring eight million realm river years, Ye Tiancai finally devoured the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon.

At the moment when it was completely devoured and refined, Ye Tian's controlled body underwent a transformation.

Originally, the ninth-level control body was already the limit of the control body of the eternal controllers, but at this moment, after devouring the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon, Ye Tian's control body broke this limit.

At this moment, Ye Tian's controlled body broke the limit, his physical strength continued to skyrocket, and his physical fitness was transforming at an incredible speed.

Thrice!

Five times over!

Ten times over!

Twenty times!

......

In the end, Ye Tian's physical body was thirty times stronger, and this transformation came to an end.

"Finally raised the body of control to the primitive. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With a primordial-level control body, Ye Tian is not only physically powerful, the primordial-level control body has a primordial golden light, this primordial golden light can make the body indestructible and invincible in defense.

Unless the primordial golden light is exhausted, even an existence that is hundreds of times stronger than his own strength will not be able to kill himself.

It can be said that any Eternal Controller who has mastered the body of primordial control has an extremely terrifying life-saving ability, and it is difficult to kill.

It's like the Quanshan master of the Futian Sect, although he is a master of the Eight Realms, his control body is still only the ninth level, and he has not mastered the primordial control body, so he does not have the primordial golden light.

If he had the primordial golden light, it would have been a bit of a struggle for the Snow Maiden to kill him.

Ye Tian immediately tested the Primal Golden Light to see if this ability was really as powerful as it was rumored.

Airplanes!!!!

A pale golden light attached to Ye Tian's body, looking very inconspicuous.

However, Ye Tian used the top-level origin control technique Void Shock on his body.

Rumble!!!!

The air shock hit him directly and was stopped by the primordial golden light.

The fierce collision occurred, but Ye Tian did not feel any damage.

"It's such a terrifying primordial golden light, it can easily block the top-notch origin control technique. However, in order to block this blow, the primordial golden light consumed a full one percent. Ye Tian said darkly.

Through a series of tests, Ye Tian had enough knowledge of the original golden light.

It can be said that with the primordial golden light, Ye Tian's strength has skyrocketed a lot.

This time, Ye Tian not only raised his body of control to the primordial level, he also strengthened his life level, and inherited some of the abilities of the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon.

Affinity of the Way!

This is an ability that belongs to the Wanxiang Lin Dragon, not a talent, the dragon scales of the Wanxiang Lin Dragon are naturally in line with the changes of the Dao, so the Wanxiang Statue transformed by the Reverse Dragon Lin will make people feel the changes of the Dao.

In other words, after having the affinity of the Dao, Ye Tian's comprehension of the changes in the Dao was hundreds or even thousands of times easier.

This is equivalent to indirectly changing Ye Tian's qualifications, and this alone is enough to make Ye Tian's fate fundamentally change.

"In the future, mastering hundreds of millions of Dao changes, the difficulty will be very small, and the time spent will be very small. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Not only is the ability of Dao affinity, Ye Tian also inherited the Ten Thousand Phases Breath of the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon.

Wanxiang breathing is also an ability, Wanxiang Linlong only needs to breathe, you can absorb endless energy to refine your body and improve your strength.

Although Ye Tian's control body has reached the primordial level, he can still slowly improve and reach the extreme of the primordial level, so this ability can also continue to improve his strength, and even break the limitations of the physical body, just relying on the physical body to reach the level of the Eighth Realm or even the Nine Realms level of the master.

This is also something that every Wanxiang Lin Dragon can do, and Ye Tian also hopes to do it.

Of course, that will take a long time, so it can only be regarded as a windfall, and it is not worth the hole cards.

For Ye Tian, the biggest opportunity this time was to obtain the affinity of the Dao and the primordial-level control body, and the rest were all incidental benefits.

At this time.

Ye Tian's strength was still at the level of the Seven Realms level of controllers, but it was infinitely close to the level of the Eight Realms level controllers.

As long as Ye Tian continued to create a few top-notch Origin Control Techniques, his strength would be able to break through the shackles and break through to the Eight Realm-level Masters level.

"Next, I will work hard to understand the changes of the Dao, and with my current Dao affinity, it will not be long before I can master the changes of the Dao of Time, the Dao of Fire, the Dao of Defense, the Dao of Thunder, and so on to hundreds of millions of kinds. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.
